title: Make local installer resolve Pi SDK peer dependency
description:
Installed to /Users/andrew.burns/.pi/agent/packages/pi-cmux
Added ./packages/pi-cmux to /Users/andrew.burns/.pi/agent/settings.json
Run /reload in pi if it is already running. copies the package into ~/.pi/agent/packages/pi-cmux without node_modules. Launching pi from that installed copy failed to resolve @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent from extensions/cmux-continue.ts after npm ci in the source checkout. A temporary symlink to the source node_modules enabled the interactive verification and was removed afterward. Investigate supported package-manager/loader resolution and make fresh local installs work without a manual dependency link.
close_reason: Installer now links the resolved Pi SDK dependencies; isolated regression test verifies installed-package resolution.

title: Keep cmux status accurate during Pi planning
acceptance_criteria: Active Pi runs refresh the cmux status once per second, and OMP silent-abort control boundaries create neither cmux notifications nor raw sidebar logs.
close_reason: Implemented and verified elapsed sidebar status updates plus exact OMP silent-abort suppression.

title: Sync Dolt remote from Git origin
acceptance_criteria: The Just recipe derives a Dolt-compatible origin from Git origin and pushes Beads through the resulting remote.
close_reason: Added and executed sync-dolt-remote; Beads push succeeded through Git-origin-equivalent URL.
